message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 40
skinparam BoxPadding 10

participant Control
participant Graph
participant "nodes[i]:Node" as NodeI
participant "ants[i]:Ant" as AntI

activate Control
Control -> Graph : getNodes()
activate Graph
Graph --> Control : nodes
deactivate Graph

loop nodes
  opt nodes[i].getContent() instanceof FreeNode
    Control -> NodeI : getAnts()
    activate NodeI
    NodeI --> Control : frms
    deactivate NodeI

    loop fourmis
      opt ants[i] instanceof MovableAnt
        AntI -> AntI : move()
        activate AntI
        deactivate AntI
      end
    end
  end
end

deactivate Control
@enduml
